name: ndesign
description: Lightweight, framework-free frontend design system and binding runtime

scripts.test: npm run test:js && npm run test:browser
scripts.build:themes: sass scss/themes/light.scss dist/themes/light.min.css --style=compressed --no-source-map && sass scss/themes/dark.scss dist/themes/dark.min.css --style=compressed --no-source-map
scripts.build:themes:dev: sass scss/themes/light.scss dist/themes/light.css --source-map && sass scss/themes/dark.scss dist/themes/dark.css --source-map
scripts.build: npm run build:dev && npm run build:prod
scripts.build:dev: npm run build:js:dev && npm run build:css:dev && npm run build:themes:dev
scripts.build:prod: npm run build:js && npm run build:css && npm run build:themes
